artifacts.name: equivalence-export.jsonl.gz
artifacts.description: Settlement-verified Kalshi<->Polymarket cross-venue equivalence pairs (139,816 pairs). Liveness-ordered with per-pair resolution_date.

artifacts.name: related-export.jsonl.gz
artifacts.description: Correlated (non-equivalent) cross-venue market pairs — same asset/event but different bands, sources, or deadlines.

artifacts.name: relations-export.jsonl.gz
artifacts.description: Full cross-venue relation pairs including bet_type, league, game_date metadata for all structured-sports matches.

artifacts.name: pm-events-export.jsonl.gz
artifacts.description: Polymarket events export — event metadata used for lookup augmentation.
